connect.routingprofile.routingprofileque: Contains information about the queue and channel for which priority and delay can be set.

connect.routingprofile.routingprofileque.Description: The delay, in seconds, a contact should be in the queue before they are routed to an available agent. For more information, see [Queues: priority and delay](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/connect/latest/adminguide/concepts-routing-profiles-priority.html) in the *Amazon Connect Administrator Guide*.

The order in which contacts are to be handled for the queue. For more information, see [Queues: priority and delay](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/connect/latest/adminguide/concepts-routing-profiles-priority.html).
Contains information about a queue resource.
